# MTGDecks Fixture Notes

Date recorded: 2026-06-21

These fixtures are local contract samples for the MTGDecks adapter. They cover event metadata, deck export text, explicit commander sections, mainboard/sideboard/auxiliary zones, missing optional fields, missing required identities, unavailable decklists, malformed text, and raw payload preservation.

They are not live MTGDecks captures. Replace or supplement with captured pages/exports before broad MTGDecks backfill work.
